scripts.build:sdk: pnpm -C ../../sdks/sandbox/javascript install --prefer-offline && pnpm -C ../../sdks/sandbox/javascript run build && pnpm -C ../../sdks/code-interpreter/javascript install --prefer-offline && pnpm -C ../../sdks/code-interpreter/javascript run build
scripts.test: pnpm run build:sdk && pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run build:sdk && pnpm exec vitest run --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=build/test-results/junit.xml
